response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at Pinepoint and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at Acme Software that aligns precisely with the role's AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C++), React experience, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and a demonstrated craftsmanship mindset (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) make him a solid fit, though Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly mentioned and Kotlin is absent.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React/AWS/MongoDB work directly matching the primary stack
Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work — a specific required skill
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshops indicating communication skills
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest (primary stack) — testing framework experience implied but not named
Kotlin not listed; Java experience exists but is dated (pre-2018)
Heavy investment in DLang side projects may signal preference for niche tech over the team's mainstream stack

key_factors.factor: Depth of senior full-stack experience and craftsmanship practices
